description: A pledge by a contributor toward a relief campaign. Tracks governance state and on-chain settlement.
name: Pledge

modules.description: Pledge lifecycle from proposal through governance, confirmation, and settlement
modules.name: lifecycle

operations.description: Propose a new pledge from a contributor

errors.description: PROPOSE_PLEDGE has already been called on this document
errors.name: PledgeAlreadyProposedError

operations.name: PROPOSE_PLEDGE
operations.template: Propose a new pledge from a contributor

operations.description: Attach governance metadata (proposal URL, vote dates, quorum)
operations.name: ATTACH_GOVERNANCE
operations.template: Attach governance metadata (proposal URL, vote dates, quorum)

operations.description: Move pledge into GOVERNANCE_PENDING (requires governance attached)

errors.description: Cannot mark governance pending from current status
errors.name: InvalidStatusTransitionError

errors.description: Governance details must be attached before marking governance pending
errors.name: GovernanceRequiredForPendingError

operations.name: MARK_GOVERNANCE_PENDING
operations.template: Move pledge into GOVERNANCE_PENDING (requires governance attached)

errors.description: Cannot confirm pledge from current status
errors.name: InvalidStatusTransitionError

operations.name: MARK_CONFIRMED
operations.reducer:
if (state.status !== 'PROPOSED' && state.status !== 'GOVERNANCE_PENDING') throw new InvalidStatusTransitionError(`Cannot confirm pledge in status ${state.status}`);
state.status = 'CONFIRMED';

operations.description: Record an on-chain receipt against this pledge

errors.description: Cannot mark received in terminal status
errors.name: InvalidStatusTransitionError

errors.description: Cumulative receipts would exceed the pledged amount
errors.name: ReceivedExceedsPledgedError

operations.name: MARK_RECEIVED
operations.template: Record an on-chain receipt against this pledge

errors.description: Cannot cancel pledge from current status
errors.name: InvalidStatusTransitionError

operations.name: CANCEL_PLEDGE

operations.description: Mark a pledge as failed (governance rejected, contributor backed out, etc.)

errors.description: Cannot fail pledge from current status
errors.name: InvalidStatusTransitionError

operations.name: FAIL_PLEDGE
operations.template: Mark a pledge as failed (governance rejected, contributor backed out, etc.)

operations.name: EDIT_NOTES
operations.reducer:
if (action.input.publicNotes) state.publicNotes = action.input.publicNotes;
if (action.input.internalNotes) state.internalNotes = action.input.internalNotes;

global.initialValue:
{
  "contributorProfileId": null,
  "pledgedAmount": null,
  "asset": null,
  "status": "PROPOSED",
  "governance": null,
  "receivedAmount": null,
  "receivedAt": null,
  "receiptIds": [],
  "publicNotes": null,
  "internalNotes": null
}
global.schema:
type PledgeState {
    contributorProfileId: PHID
    pledgedAmount: Amount_Tokens
    asset: PledgeAsset
    status: PledgeStatus!
    governance: PledgeGovernance
    receivedAmount: Amount_Tokens
    receivedAt: DateTime
    receiptIds: [PHID!]!
    publicNotes: String
    internalNotes: String
}

enum PledgeStatus {
    PROPOSED
    GOVERNANCE_PENDING
    CONFIRMED
    RECEIVED
    CANCELLED
    FAILED
}

enum GovernancePlatform {
    SNAPSHOT
    TALLY
    FORUM
    AGORA
    OTHER
}

type PledgeAsset {
    symbol: String!
    address: EthereumAddress
    chainId: Int!
}

type PledgeGovernance {
    platform: GovernancePlatform!
    proposalUrl: URL!
    voteEndDate: DateTime
    quorumStatus: String
}
